experience.title: Communications Engagement Partner
experience.description: Working across Partnerships & People, responsible for external and internal communications & engagement at Leyton UK & Ireland. Partnership's & Commercial Engagement - create and deliver content marketing for our key strategic Partners, highlighting Leyton UKs expertise & thought leadership across Innovation Funding & Tax Consulting in the UK & Ireland. Manage delivery of Partner events across the UK. Responsible for creative content, including Leyton’s Expert Exchange Podcast, Video Case Studies and client facing newsletters. Internal Communications - Supporting Senior Leadership to communicate with our people in an effective and engaging way. Talent Engagement - create and deliver recruitment marketing and all communications to our external Talent Community. Showcasing life at Leyton UK through the real stories of our people. experience.title: Strategic Partnerships Manager - UK IE
experience.description: I work with membership associations, industry networks, and commercial partners across the UK and Ireland to deliver real value for their members and clients. My role is to unlock opportunities – through targeted co-branded campaigns, joint events and webinars, thought leadership content, and referral partnerships. I manage end-to-end relationships with our partners, from identifying high-potential networks to structuring partnerships, coordinating expert input, and delivering high-impact content aligned to each partner's audience. My focus is on bringing Leyton's expertise to niche networks and helping businesses understand and access innovation funding, tax incentives, and compensation schemes. By aligning our expertise with the needs of industry communities, I help partners strengthen their value proposition while supporting businesses to unlock funding and fuel future growth.

linkedin_profile.headline: Commercial Vice President for Red Carnation Hotels
linkedin_profile.about:
With a robust leadership role at Red Carnation Hotels, my focus is on shaping global commercial strategies for an exquisite collection of luxury boutique hotels. The heart of my role lies in managing and strategically developing sales, marketing, revenue, distribution, and reservations teams. Success in these areas has been marked by the launch of four new properties, creating a central reservations office, leading significant technology projects such as Opera Cloud PMS, Salesforce CRM and a guest service app, whilst showcasing a commitment to sustainable luxury in the hospitality industry. Collaborating closely with strategic agency partnerships, we have optimized revenue growth opportunities across 18 properties worldwide. My approach is both creative and data-driven, ensuring that every decision aligns with our mission to deliver unparalleled customer experiences. This includes a keen emphasis on customer acquisition, conversion, retention, and cross/up-selling, all while fostering authentic, purpose-driven initiatives that support sustainable travel.

Total Experience: 23 years
